title: the feeling saying you're alive
description: Lyrics from the feeling saying you're alive
body:
i’ve been singing saying whispering
silent praying crying gibbering
just to see if you could hear me
i can’t tell
so can you tell me if i’m here
i can’t hear you very well
well i don’t listen all too swell
but i can hear the music swell
it’s how i know i’m not too lost
so please keep singing your own song
i’ll find the rhythm fore too long
you’re the siren, i’m the building burning down
or maybe it’s the other way around
it’s hard to tell, it’s always turning
every day i’m learning just how dumb and blind i am
the smoke gets in your eyes but now and then
you find the fire is your friend
the warmth your only guide
the feeling saying you’re alive
